event.title: Battle of Actium
event.description: Octavian defeated the combined forces of Mark Antony and Cleopatra, becoming Rome's first emperor.

event.title: Storming of the Bastille
event.description: Parisian crowds stormed the Bastille fortress, marking the start of the French Revolution.

event.title: Napoleon crowned Emperor
event.description: Napoleon Bonaparte crowned himself Emperor of the French at Notre-Dame de Paris.

event.title: Declaration of the Rights of Man
event.description: The National Constituent Assembly adopted this foundational document of human rights.

event.title: Julius Caesar invades Britain
event.description: Julius Caesar led the first Roman expedition to Britain, landing on the Kent coast.

event.title: Execution of Louis XVI
event.description: King Louis XVI was guillotined at the Place de la Révolution in Paris.
